_meta.description: Installation result template for the alpha2 APK on a real Android device.

fillInstructions.apkPath: Absolute path to the alpha2 APK used for testing.
fillInstructions.apkSha256: SHA-256 of the APK for integrity: `certutil -hashfile <apk> SHA256` (Windows) or `sha256sum <apk>`.
fillInstructions.packageName: Confirmed via `adb shell pm list packages | grep <keyword>` after install.
fillInstructions.versionName: Output of `adb shell dumpsys package <pkg> | grep versionName`.
fillInstructions.versionCode: Output of `adb shell dumpsys package <pkg> | grep versionCode` as integer.
fillInstructions.coldStartTime: Use `am start -W` WaitTime as the cold-start metric.
fillInstructions.firstScreen: Screenshot captured immediately after cold launch; verify it shows the expected first-run view.
